name: obsidian-heading-autolink
description: Automatically keeps Obsidian wikilinks in sync with Markdown heading renames and inserts heading links with aliases.

scripts.build: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && mkdir -p build && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css build/
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: JaewonE
